Name: M 38 - Stephen Loffredo,  Conflicts of Interest Board
Title: RESOLUTION APPROVING THE APPOINTMENT BY THE MAYOR OF STEPHEN LOFFREDO AS A MEMBER OF THE NEW YORK CITY CONFLICTS OF INTEREST BOARD.
BodyName: Committee on Rules, Privileges, Elections, Standards and Ethics

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee
History.BodyName: Committee on Rules, Privileges, Elections, Standards and Ethics

Text:
RESOLVED, Pursuant to Section 2602 of the New York City Charter, the Council hereby approves the appointment by the Mayor of Stephen Loffredo. as a member of the New York City Conflicts of Interest Board to serve a six-year term beginning on April 1, 2026, and expiring on March 31, 2032.

COUPLED ON GO

\pard\ltrpar\fi360\b0 The Committee on Rules, Privileges, Elections, Standards and Ethics respectfully reports:\par
\pard\ltrpar\fi720\par
\pard\ltrpar\li360\sl276\slmult1\qj Pursuant to Section 2602 of the New York City Charter, the Committee on Rules, Privileges, Elections, Standards and Ethics hereby approves the appointment by the Mayor of Stephen Loffredo as a member of the New York City Conflicts of Interest Board for a six-year term beginning on April 1, 2026, and expiring on March 31, 2032\f1 .\par
\pard\ltrpar\fi720\sl276\slmult1\qj\par
\pard\ltrpar\fi360\sl276\slmult1\qj\f0 This matter was heard on February 25, 2026.\f1\par
\pard\ltrpar\fi720\li3600\sa200\sl276\slmult1\par
